remove_after_first_level_1_heading: List Paragraph items such as (1), (2), 1., and 1)
Normal explanatory paragraphs including figure/table captions
must_preserve: cover area before the first level-1 heading
cover tables, title text, date text, TOC entry zone, and spacing
minimax_docx_policy: Prefer vendor/minimax-docx for structural DOCX work. Use python-docx only for simple cleanup or documented fallback.
